Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('src/app/\(public\)/services/visuels-publicitaires/page.tsx','utf8'\); console.log\('Lines:', src.split\('\\n'\).length\); console.log\('Has use client:', src.startsWith\('\\"use client\\"'\)\); console.log\('Has VisualRow:', src.includes\('type VisualRow'\)\); console.log\('Has getSupabase:', src.includes\('getSupabase'\)\); console.log\('Has MultiLineReveal:', src.includes\('MultiLineReveal'\)\); console.log\('Has staggerContainer:', src.includes\('staggerContainer'\)\); console.log\('Has export default:', src.includes\('export default function VisuelsPublicitairesPage'\)\); console.log\('First 3 chars:', JSON.stringify\(src.slice\(0,14\)\)\);")
